Research n8n for 7 social accounts. Install and configure on Kikai's machine.
10 product listings ready for Monday 8:30 AM upload. Copy, images, prices verified.

directive.statusSummary: T-47 HOURS TO LAUNCH. All agents active. Yama: E2E audit + QA report delivered, launch day plan written. Kodo: 67 Market spec + memes delivered. Kikai: PN research + ops. 24 FC files await commit+push. Morning brief ready for WJP.
directive.riskAssessment:
- **HIGH**: SDK/CLI not on npm. Every developer CTA points to nonexistent packages. #1 launch risk. BLOCKED ON WJP.
- **HIGH**: 24 unstaged FC changes need commit+push for Vercel to deploy overnight fixes.
- **MEDIUM**: Marketplace empty until Monday 8:30 AM upload. 10 products + copy ready.
- **LOW**: dashboard.wjp.studio using alias workaround (functional).
directive.decisions: WJP needs to: (1) npm publish SDK+CLI, (2) review+approve FC commit, (3) confirm product pricing, (4) revoke Netlify token.
directive.launchReadiness: Code: 95% ready (pending commit). Content: 90% ready (memes scheduled, distribution materials done). Infrastructure: 100% (site live, APIs working). Products: 80% (copy ready, need upload). Biggest gap: SDK/CLI packages.
